text:
{"fixed_xml":"<ITEM>7. <BIBL><TITLE>Der Merck-und Lesens-würdige Tractat, genandt, der Fluchtige Pater aus Rom</TITLE>, worinnen, nach dem Buch Danielis und der Offenbahrung Johannis, von denen nächst bevorstehenden schröcklichen Gerichten GOttes, und wie das Evangelium in Occident erlöschen und in Orient unter Türcken Juden und Heyden aufgehen werde, auch von dem Ende der Welt, außführlich und nachtrücklich gehandelt wird, ist wiederum in den Berichthauß zu haben <PRICE>das Stuck à 4. ß.</PRICE></BIBL></ITEM>","number_of_corrections":7,"explanation":"
1. DUPLICATE/MISPLACED TITLE TAG: The closing </TITLE> tag appeared twice — once after "Rom" and once after "gehandelt wird". The second occurrence was a duplicate closing tag. The full subtitle/description is part of the bibliographic entry but not a second title. The closing </TITLE> after "Rom" is correct; the second </TITLE> was removed.
2. MALFORMED OPENING: The text "Cworinnen" was a corrupted rendering of ", worinnen" — the leading "C" was an OCR/encoding artifact. Corrected to ", worinnen".
3. ENCODING ARTIFACTS (multiple): Several Unicode replacement characters (√ü, √§, √∂, √ú, √ü, √ú, √ú, √ú) were garbled encodings of standard Early Modern German characters. Corrected as follows:
   - "w√ü rdige" → "würdige"
   - "n√§chst" → "nächst"
   - "schr√∂cklichen" → "schröcklichen"
   - "erl√∂schen" → "erlöschen"
   - "T√ú rcken" → "Türcken"
   - "au√üf√ü hrlich" → "außführlich"
   - "nachtr√ú cklich" → "nachtrücklich"
   - "Berichthau√ü" → "Berichthauß"
4. WRONG TAG NAME: The tag <PRIZE> was incorrect for a price field. Corrected to <PRICE>.
5. ENCODING IN PRICE: "√† 4. √ü." was a garbled encoding of "à 4. ß." (à = at/per, ß = Schilling or similar currency symbol). Corrected accordingly.
6. STRAY PARENTHESIS: A closing parenthesis ")" appeared before "ist wiederum" with no matching opening parenthesis. Removed as an artifact.
"}
